info.title: Analyses service
info.description: Analyses restapi service for medstorm project

delete.description: depending on the softDelete parameter either deletes panel from the system or marks it as deleted
depending on the softDelete parameter either deletes analysis from the system or marks it as deleted

post.description: saves new panel to the system
saves new container to the system
saves new biomaterial to the system
saves new analysis to the system
Searches/sorts analyses by predicates and sort field
Returns a list of analyses with requested ids

patch.summary: Set tests results for one specimen

get.summary: Get all test results by order id
get.description: Returns all test results for every specimen belonging to the given order
returns a paginated list of all tests

get.summary: Get all tests by specimen id
get.description: returns a paginated list of all tests assigned to specimen
returns list of specimens bt orderId
returns a paginated list of all specimens
returns a paginated list of all panels

get.summary: Get all panels by panel group
get.description: returns a paginated list of all panels that refer to required panel group
returns a paginated list of all panels groups
returns a paginated list of all containers
returns a paginated list of all categories

delete.description: depending on the softDelete parameter either deletes biomaterial from the system or marks it as deleted

get.description: returns a paginated list of all biomaterials
returns a paginated list of all analysis

get.summary: Get all analysis by category code
get.description: returns a paginated list of all analysis that refer to required category group

keyword.description: Keyword matches in name, description & code

sortField.description: Sorting by one of values. ID is default

results.description: Map where key is analysis ID and value is the test result for analysis
